name: [fn] testID is forwarded to the Pressable
[fn] press toggles uncontrolled switch from false to true
[fn] press toggles uncontrolled switch from true to false
[fn] onCheckedChange fires with true on first press (default unchecked)
[fn] onCheckedChange fires with false when toggling off
[fn] disabled=true: press does NOT fire onCheckedChange
[fn] disabled=true: checked state does not toggle on press
[fn] readOnly=true: press does NOT fire onCheckedChange
[fn] readOnly=true: checked state does not toggle on press
[fn] aria-label reflected as accessibilityLabel on control
[fn] children string rendered as visible Text in tree
[fn] children string also used as accessibilityLabel when aria-label absent
[fn] label Text has accessible=false (not a separate a11y element)
[fn] disabled=true: Pressable native disabled prop is true
[fn] enabled switch: Pressable native disabled prop is false
[fn] accessibilityHint is forwarded to the control
[a11y] unchecked: screen reader reads switch as "off" (checked=false)
[a11y] checked=true: screen reader reads switch as "on" (checked=true)
[a11y] disabled switch announced as disabled to screen readers
[a11y] accessibilityHint forwarded for screen reader interaction guidance
